title: Four former DOGE staffers raised $160 million at a $1.4 billion valuation for an AI military cyber startup
excerpt: Cathedral, a stealth military cybersecurity startup founded by four former Department of Government Efficiency staffers, has raised $160 million at a $1.4 billion valuation. Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia Capital led the round and both took board seats. The company plans to secure US government contracts for AI-driven offensive and defensive cyber operations against adversaries including […]
content_html:
Cathedral, a stealth military cybersecurity startup founded by four former Department of Government Efficiency staffers, has raised $160 million at a $1.4 billion valuation. Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia Capital led the round and both took board seats. The company plans to secure US government contracts for AI-driven offensive and defensive cyber operations against adversaries including China.

The founders are Gavin Kliger, Luke Farritor, Marko Elez, and Jack Stein. Kliger served as chief data officer at the Pentagon, where he was involved in the department’s legal fight with Anthropic over how Claude would be used by the military. The founding team maintains deep ties to the Trump administration and national security officials. Cathedral is also looking to acquire or partner with a data centre provider for dedicated compute power to run its cyber operations.

The funding underscores how DOGE alumni are converting government access into venture capital. More than 250,000 people left the federal workforce during DOGE’s cost-cutting campaign in 2025. The staffers who ran those operations are now building companies that sell services back to the government they reshaped. Anduril raised $5 billion at a $61 billion valuation as the defence tech sector attracts capital at AI-lab pace, and Cathedral enters the same market with the additional advantage of founders who recently held senior positions inside the agencies they plan to sell to.

The $1.4 billion valuation for a company with no disclosed revenue or contracts reflects investor confidence in the team’s government relationships rather than the product’s track record. The White House launched Gold Eagle this month, an AI-powered cyber vulnerability clearinghouse, signalling that the administration sees AI-driven cyber defence as a priority. Cathedral is positioning itself to be one of the companies that benefits from that priority. Whether a startup founded by cost-cutters can build enterprise-grade military software is the question the next round will need to answer with contracts, not connections.

sentences.zh: Cathedral 是一家秘密军事网络安全初创公司，由四名前政府效率部工作人员创立，已筹集 1.6 亿美元，估值为 14 亿美元。

sentences.zh: 安德森霍洛维茨和红杉资本领投此轮，并都占据了董事会席位。

sentences.en: The company plans to secure US government contracts for AI-driven offensive and defensive cyber operations against adversaries including China.
sentences.zh: 该公司计划获得美国政府合同，针对包括中国在内的对手进行人工智能驱动的进攻和防御网络行动。

The founding team maintains deep ties to the Trump administration and national security officials. Cathedral is also looking to acquire or partner with a data centre provider for dedicated compute power to run its cyber operations.

sentences.en: The founding team maintains deep ties to the Trump administration and national security officials.
sentences.zh: 创始团队与特朗普政府和国家安全官员保持着深厚的联系。

sentences.en: Cathedral is also looking to acquire or partner with a data centre provider for dedicated compute power to run its cyber operations.
sentences.zh: Cathedral 还寻求收购数据中心提供商或与数据中心提供商合作，以获得专用计算能力来运行其网络运营。

Anduril raised $5 billion at a $61 billion valuation as the defence tech sector attracts capital at AI-lab pace, and Cathedral enters the same market with the additional advantage of founders who recently held senior positions inside the agencies they plan to sell to.

sentences.zh: 2025 年 DOGE 的成本削减运动期间，超过 25 万人离开联邦劳动力。

sentences.en: Anduril raised $5 billion at a $61 billion valuation as the defence tech sector attracts capital at AI-lab pace, and Cathedral enters the same market with the additional advantage of founders who recently held senior positions inside the agencies they plan to sell to.
sentences.zh: 随着国防科技行业以 AI 实验室的速度吸引资本，Anduril 以 610 亿美元的估值筹集了 50 亿美元，而 Cathedral 凭借其创始人最近在计划出售给的机构中担任高级职位的额外优势进入了同一市场。

content_html_zh:
Cathedral 是一家秘密军事网络安全初创公司，由四名前政府效率部工作人员创立，已筹集 1.6 亿美元，估值为 14 亿美元。 安德森霍洛维茨和红杉资本领投此轮，并都占据了董事会席位。 该公司计划获得美国政府合同，针对包括中国在内的对手进行人工智能驱动的进攻和防御网络行动。

创始人是 Gavin Kliger、Luke Farritor、Marko Elez 和 Jack Stein。 克利格曾担任五角大楼首席数据官，参与了该部门与 Anthropic 就军方如何使用克劳德问题进行的法律斗争。 创始团队与特朗普政府和国家安全官员保持着深厚的联系。 Cathedral 还寻求收购数据中心提供商或与数据中心提供商合作，以获得专用计算能力来运行其网络运营。

这笔资金凸显了 DOGE 校友如何将政府准入转化为风险投资。 2025 年 DOGE 的成本削减运动期间，超过 25 万人离开联邦劳动力。 负责这些业务的员工现在正在建立公司，向他们重塑的政府出售服务。 随着国防科技行业以 AI 实验室的速度吸引资本，Anduril 以 610 亿美元的估值筹集了 50 亿美元，而 Cathedral 凭借其创始人最近在计划出售给的机构中担任高级职位的额外优势进入了同一市场。

对于一家没有披露收入或合同的公司来说，14 亿美元的估值反映了投资者对该团队与政府关系的信心，而不是对该产品的业绩记录的信心。 白宫本月推出了金鹰，这是一个由人工智能驱动的网络漏洞信息交换所，这表明政府将人工智能驱动的网络防御视为优先事项。 Cathedral 将自己定位为受益于这一优先事项的公司之一。 由成本削减者创立的初创公司是否能够构建企业级军事软件是下一轮需要通过合同而不是联系来回答的问题。
